summary: Compared the successful 2026-03-26 05:29:53-05:29:56 EDT SuiteLoginSessionValidation-to-home.php baseline against a recent failed candidate at 2026-03-25 12:56:01 EDT. follow_up_recommendations: Correlate the 2026-03-25 12:56:01 EDT failed SuiteLoginSessionValidation request with cookie and session state on the client side, because the server-side redirect pattern matches the unauthenticated branch in SuiteLoginSessionValidation.php.

If a deeper server-side trace is needed, capture application logs that include utils::PrintLog output for the same timestamp to determine whether the branch was triggered by empty cookies, failed AFA auth, or username resolution failure.
